memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q4_1

briefdescription.para: GEMM with transposed Q4_1 weights: C = A @ B^T.

parameterdescription.para: Input activations [M x K], row-major FP32
Weight matrix in Q4_1 format [N x K], row-major quantized
Optional bias [N], NULL if not used

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const float *X, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q4_1

memberdef.argsstring: (float *dX, const void *W, const float *dY, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q4_1_backward

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_1

memberdef.argsstring: (float *dX, const void *W, const float *dY, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_1_backward

memberdef.argsstring: (float *dX, const void *W, const float *dY, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_1_backward_ref

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q4_1 format [M x K]

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_1_ref

briefdescription.para: Matrix-vector multiply with Q4_1 weights (scalar reference)

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q4_1 format [M x K]
Number of columns (must be multiple of 32)

briefdescription.para: GEMM/GEMV kernels with Q4_1 quantized weights.

detaileddescription.para:
Q4_1 Format:
32 weights per block
1 FP16 scale (d) per block
1 FP16 minimum (m) per block
20 bytes per 32 weights = 5.0 bits/weight
Dequantization: w = d * q + m where q is the 4-bit unsigned value (0-15)
Operations: Forward: Y = W @ X (W is Q4_1, X and Y are FP32) Backward: dX = W^T @ dY (gradient w.r.t. input)
